---
name: CLD Initiative
about: Describe a problem to investigate using the Closed-Loop Delivery workflow
title: "INIT-YYYY-NNN: "
labels: cld-initiative
---

<!--
  This issue frames the problem. It is not a solution proposal.
  If you catch yourself writing "build X" or "add Y" — stop.
  That's a solution. Rephrase as the pain or gap that X or Y would address.

  Once the problem is clear, create docs/initiatives/INIT-YYYY-NNN.md
  and docs/hypotheses/HYP-YYYY-NNN.md using the templates in docs/cld/templates/.
-->

## Problem

_What is broken, missing, or worth improving? Describe the symptom, not the solution._

## Who Experiences It

_Which users, roles, or systems are affected? How often? At what scale?_

## Evidence It Exists

_What data, observation, or signal confirms this is real — not hypothetical? "We think" is not evidence._

## Assumptions

_List what you are taking for granted. Each becomes a candidate HYP-\*.md._

- [ ]
- [ ]

## Success Signal

_What observable change would indicate this problem is solved? How would we measure it?_

## Next Step

- [ ] Create `docs/initiatives/INIT-YYYY-NNN.md`
- [ ] Create at least one `docs/hypotheses/HYP-YYYY-NNN.md` with a falsification signal
